mapper.select: SELECT id ,thread_id as threadId ,post_num as postNum ,user_id as userId ,author_name as authorName ,content ,ip_address as ipAddress ,created_at as createdAt FROM posts WHERE thread_id = #{threadId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (thread_id, post_num, user_id, author_name,content, ip_address, created_at) VALUES (#{threadId},#{postNum},#{userId},#{authorName},#{content},#{ipAddress},#{createdAt})
